creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #309)

I should have mentioned: same version of drm-510-kmod and
graphics/gpu-firmware-amd-kmod as well. Just multiple
examples of failures, booting the same code over and over.



And for comment #310:

I'll remind that the unusual failure for the different
list was in nfsd and was during shutdown, not during
booting.
